title: Aarhus Boat Rental: Costs, Season and What to Know in 2026
html:
Renting a yacht in Aarhus gives you access to the sheltered waters of the Bay of Aarhus, a patchwork of islands and deep fjords. A half-day motorboat charter from Marselisborg Marina starts from around EUR 250, and you can browse options through boat rental Aarhus on BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace.

Where to set off in Aarhus

Aarhus has several real departure points for boating holidays. The main hub is Aarhus Lystbådehavn (Aarhus Marina), located just south of the city centre, with pontoon berths and fuel. Marselisborg Marina is a short walk from the Marselisborg Palace and offers calm waters. For a faster start towards the open sea, Moesgaard Marina is handy for exploring the southern coast. Nearby towns such as Ebeltoft (30 minutes by boat) and the island of Samsø (a 20-nautical-mile crossing) make excellent day trips. You can boat rental Aarhus for your chosen dates.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (e.g. Quicksilver Activ 605): Ideal for coastal cruising around the bay, up to 6 guests, from EUR 200 for a half-day.
  2. Bowrider or day cruiser: Perfect for a family picnic on a sandy beach, 6, 8 guests, from EUR 350 for a full day.
  3. Luxury motor yacht (e.g. Princess V58): For a premium experience with a flying bridge and cabin comfort, up to 8 guests, from EUR 1,200 for a day charter. You can compare details on the Princess V58 listing.
  4. Sailing yacht (e.g. 38-foot Beneteau): A relaxed way to explore the archipelago, 6 guests, from EUR 500 for a day.
  5. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 42): Stable and spacious, ideal for groups up to 10, from EUR 900 for a full day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Aarhus?

Prices start at around EUR 100 for a shared sightseeing tour and rise to EUR 1,500 for a fully crewed luxury yacht per day. One option worth a look is the Princess V58 listing.

  • Shared tour on a RIB: from EUR 100 per person for a 2-hour trip around the bay.
  • Small motorboat (half-day, self-drive): from EUR 250.
  • Catamaran (full-day, bareboat): from EUR 800.
  • Luxury motor yacht with skipper (full-day): from EUR 1,200.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Aarhus?

For most motorboats up to 15 hp (11 kW) no licence is needed, but larger boats require a Danish Speedboat Certificate or an equivalent international licence; the operator will confirm exact requirements at booking.

Try a late-afternoon sail towards the island of Tunø; the harbour at Ballen has a friendly restaurant serving fresh plaice, and the sunset light on the limestone cliffs is unforgettable.

At a glance

  • Price range: EUR 100, 1,500 per day
  • Peak months: June to August
  • Typical trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Maximum guest capacity: 8, 10 on larger yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Popular boat types: Motorboat, sailing yacht, catamaran

Questions about boat rental in Aarhus

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in Aarhus?

Yes, many smaller boats are available bareboat, provided you hold a valid licence or meet the hp exemption.

What is the best month for sailing near Aarhus?

July offers the warmest water and a prevailing south-westerly wind that makes for steady sailing.

Is there a deposit required for chartering a yacht in Aarhus?

Most rentals ask for a refundable deposit of EUR 500 to EUR 2,000, depending on the boat value.

Can I moor overnight on the islands around Aarhus?

Yes, several islands such as Samsø and Tunø have guest harbours with basic facilities for a fee.

Whether you are planning a day sail or a week-long cruise, Aarhus offers a versatile boating scene.
